title: Presentation available on recruitment, procurement or property management?
excerpt:
Hi, 
I’m preparing a presentation about Monday. I just need to check if anyone here does have a presentation based on the below department that I can use. 

procurement
recruitment
property management

Regards, 
Marie

posts.author: Marie (Marie)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I’m preparing a presentation about Monday. I just need to check if anyone here does have a presentation based on the below department that I can use.

  1. procurement
  2. recruitment
  3. property management

Regards,
Marie

posts.author: bradley (Bradley Vanderhorst)
posts.cookedHtml:
hey @Marie - I know you may want to hear from other in the community, but have you explored these:

1- Ops Success stories | monday.com or Admin Success stories | monday.com
2- Success stories | monday.com
3- Don’t have a direct one but perhaps ideas on sales? Success stories | monday.com

Let us know what you think

posts.author: Marie (Marie)
posts.cookedHtml:
@bradley These will be useful in preparing my presentation, Thank you so much.

But quick question Did you ever send an introductory email or presentation to a client about Monday.?
